title: When an item is created in this board, create an item in another board automation doesn't work
excerpt: I’m trying to set up the subjected automation. I select the board on which I wish the new item to be created but when I click on item to set up the fields to sync Monday just starts flickering and eventually get a messag…

posts.author: kinga.nemes (Kinga Nemes)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to set up the subjected automation. I select the board on which I wish the new item to be created but when I click on item to set up the fields to sync Monday just starts flickering and eventually get a message saying ‘Failed to load fields’

image1400×745 18.1 KB

Would be keen to know if something is wrong with my board or if this is happening to everyone else and is a bug.

Thanks fellow Monday users.
